scripts.build:packages: cd packages/contracts && bun run build && cd ../core && bun run build && cd ../metrics && bun run build && cd ../sdk && bun run build
scripts.build: bun run build:packages && cd apps/admin-api && bun run build
scripts.publish:dry-run: cd packages/contracts && bun pm pack --dry-run && cd ../core && bun pm pack --dry-run && cd ../metrics && bun pm pack --dry-run && cd ../sdk && bun pm pack --dry-run
scripts.release:check: bun run build && bun run publish:dry-run
scripts.release:publish: cd packages/contracts && npm publish --access public && cd ../core && npm publish --access public && cd ../metrics && npm publish --access public && cd ../sdk && npm publish --access public
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run integration && bun run build && bun run check:openapi
